name: rellax

en.when_to_use: Use it for continuous depth parallax as hero layers, background layers, or decorative elements move with scrolling. Use rellax for continuous parallax and aos for a one-time entrance reveal. You provide elements plus data-rellax-speed on each, and rellax runs the rAF transform loop.
en.why_valuable: Smooth 60fps scroll parallax that neither jitters nor fights layout is genuinely hard to write. Naive scroll listeners produce janky motion and layout thrashing; rellax uses transforms for smooth, high-performance movement.

data_in.note: Parallax strength comes from data-rellax-speed on each target element (negative moves backward more slowly, positive moves forward faster). The constructor's first argument is a selector in document scope or an element node.

schema.target: string selector (document scope) | Element node -- a node can target inside shadow DOM; defaults to '.rellax'

options?.speed?: number -- global speed when data-rellax-speed is absent; defaults to -2
options?.center?: boolean -- use the viewport center as the zero point; defaults to false
options?.vertical?: boolean -- vertical parallax; defaults to true
options?.horizontal?: boolean -- horizontal parallax; defaults to false
options?.round?: boolean -- round pixels to prevent jitter; defaults to true
options?.wrapper?: string | Element -- custom scroll container; defaults to null=window

schema._perElementAttrs: data-rellax-speed / data-rellax-percentage / data-rellax-zindex are set on each target element

when_to_use: hero/分层背景/装饰元素随滚动做连续深度视差时用它;连续视差用它,一次性进场揭示用 aos。你提供元素 + 每元素 data-rellax-speed,rellax 跑 rAF transform 循环。
why_valuable: 保持 60fps、不抖不与 layout 打架的滚动视差真的难写;朴素 scroll 监听产出 janky、thrash layout 的运动。rellax 用 transform 做到平顺高性能。

data_in.note: 视差强度来自每个目标元素的 data-rellax-speed(负=后退更慢,正=前进更快);构造器第一参是选择器(document 域)或元素节点。

schema.target: string 选择器(document 域)| Element 节点 —— 传节点可命中 shadow;默认 '.rellax'

options?.speed?: number —— 无 data-rellax-speed 时的全局速度,默认 -2
options?.center?: boolean —— 以视口中心为 0 点,默认 false
options?.vertical?: boolean —— 纵向视差,默认 true
options?.horizontal?: boolean —— 横向视差,默认 false
options?.round?: boolean —— 像素取整防抖,默认 true
options?.wrapper?: string | Element —— 自定义滚动容器,默认 null=window

schema._perElementAttrs: data-rellax-speed / data-rellax-percentage / data-rellax-zindex 写在每个目标元素上

boot.codex:
import Rellax from 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/rellax@1.12.1/+esm';
const rellax = new Rellax(data.target ?? '.rellax', data.options ?? {});

example._why: 示例钉本库的 target+options 契约;真正的每元素强度写在 data-rellax-speed 上。

uplink: 纯 display,无 uplink;滚动位置由 rellax 自读 window,不外传状态。

carriers.widget: conditional:传元素节点(选择器是 document 域,够不到 shadow);会加 window resize/orientationchange 监听,destroy() 清除

isolation.evidence: API correct: +esm default export(Ae as default)= Rellax(target, options);构造器 `typeof s=='string'?document.querySelectorAll(s):[s]` —— 字符串走 document 域,NODE 被接受(包成单元素)故传节点可命中 shadow。默认:speed -2、vertical true、horizontal false、center false、round true。globalStyleInjection=no;globalDomMutation=no:只改 elems[i].style.cssText(transform),读 document.body.scrollTop/scrollLeft 求位置。globalEvents=yes:window.addEventListener('resize'/'orientationchange') + passive 探测;refresh/destroy 里 window.removeEventListener(grep)。shadowCompatible=conditional:传元素节点即可(选择器为 document 域)。
